response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (22%) is only marginally below the 20% share threshold and insufficient buffer exists; with three critical peers at 10% and my 5-hour survival requirement on 0.99 kWh usable capacity, I cannot spare 0.5 kWh without risking cascade failure.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r3c5. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.22 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.2, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Three critical peers at 10% SoC pose cascading failure risk; I must survive 5 more hours on 0.99 kWh usable capacity while managing urgent requests..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
